text.title: langchain-rag-pipeline Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for langchain-rag-pipeline with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.root-cause: Chunk overlap is zero and the boundary fell mid-sentence; relevant passage split across chunks neither of which alone matches the query.
antipattern.fix: Use RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter with chunk_overlap≈10% of chunk_size.
antipattern.detector: Hold out a labeled question set; track recall@5 after re-chunking.

antipattern.symptom: Embedding cost explodes after a re-index
antipattern.root-cause: Embedded the same docs twice because content_id was based on path, not content_hash.
antipattern.fix: Hash document bodies, store doc_hash in vectorstore metadata, skip re-embedding when hash matches.
antipattern.detector: Compare token count consumed by embed step run-over-run; should drop to near zero after no-op re-index.

antipattern.symptom: Retrieval pulls relevant chunks, but the LLM ignores them
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt template puts retrieved context after the question; model focuses on the question.
antipattern.fix: Put context FIRST, then question, with explicit instruction 'Use only the context above'.
antipattern.detector: Insert a sentinel fact in the context; verify the model uses it.

antipattern.symptom: k=20 floods the prompt; model gets confused
antipattern.root-cause: Default k was kept; no reranker applied.
antipattern.fix: Set retriever_k to 4-6; add a cross-encoder reranker if you must overfetch.
antipattern.detector: Plot answer accuracy vs k; pick the smallest k at the accuracy plateau.
